title: EasyHeal
description: Heal yourself with this simple plugin!
body:
EasyHeal is a lightweight and efficient plugin designed to offer a straightforward solution for instant health and hunger restoration on your Minecraft server. This utility provides an intuitive way for players to instantly replenish their vitality and food levels, ensuring they can get back into the action without delay. Its functionality extends beyond self-use, allowing for the restoration of fellow players' health and hunger as well.

For seamless integration, every message displayed by the plugin can be fully customized through a simple configuration file, allowing you to tailor all text to fit your community's unique style. Built for modern servers, this plugin is optimized for API version 1.21, offering a reliable and no-fuss experience. EasyHeal is the perfect drop-in solution for administrators looking to add a simple yet essential quality-of-life feature to their server.

Permissions: easyheal.heal - Allows healing self and others

Commands: /heal or /feed - Restores health and hunger
